title: Packet 044 And Packet 045 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the local Packet 044 closure authority and Packet 045 reassessment authority through the parent-root boundary, then resynchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting commit without treating authority publication as migration approval.
active_role: Olares Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 045 reassessed the lane after Packet 044 and found `/home/olares/code/apex` clean at `c6a1546c4b61b53b823d65dae4fbcdfed24c33c0`, with the workstation-migration lane still only conditionally ready for later bounded source/test trial posture after Packet 044 and Packet 045 authority publication and host-mirror resync.
required_inputs: Current Packet 044 closure handoff and Packet 044 JSON completion state
Current Packet 045 closure handoff and Packet 045 JSON completion state
Current Packet 046 draft, routing handoff, and roadmap updates
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, remote, and cleanliness
Current `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count
constrained_outputs: A bounded parent-root publication commit and push containing only Packet 044 closure authority, Packet 045 closure authority, Packet 046 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates needed for this gate

A host mirror resync record proving `/home/olares/code/apex` reached clean parity with the published commit without force/reset/clean, remote rewrite, runtime/service mutation, package mutation, install, or old-clone mutation
A publication and host-mirror resync handoff recording staged scope, commit hash, push result, host pre/post state, excluded drift, and the next decision candidate
validation_steps: Reconfirm parent-root status and distinguish Packet 044/045 closure authority from unrelated `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift.
Reconfirm source files, package files, and lockfiles remain clean and outside the publication scope.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at `c6a1546c4b61b53b823d65dae4fbcdfed24c33c0` before publication.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only Packet 044 closure authority, Packet 045 closure authority, Packet 046 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates required by this gate.
Run `git diff --cached --check` and inspect staged path scope before committing.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication only if staged scope is exact.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit only if it can be done non-destructively.

Do not force, reset, clean, rewrite remotes, mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`, install dependencies, mutate packages or lockfiles, mutate runtime or services, approve migration, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, edit source, or open another execution trial.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, migration approval, force/reset/clean, rollback, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded authority publication and non-destructive `/home/olares/code/apex` mirror resync.
closure_note: Not yet executed. Packet 046 is prepared because Packet 045 closed with local Packet 044 and Packet 045 authority requiring publication and host-mirror resync before any later trial planning or execution.
next_action: Execute only as a bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync gate. Do not approve migration or open another source/test execution trial.
